title: iris × germanica subsp. illyrica
intro: Iris × germanica subsp. illyrica, also known as the Illyrian iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the iris family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iris × germanica subsp. illyrica include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and wound healer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
